title: Modern Tech Stack

items.heading: Presentation Layer
items.description: User interfaces and client apps that interact with users.

items.heading: Application Layer
items.description: Business logic and processing rules that drive the app's behavior.

items.heading: Data Layer
items.description: Databases and data storage systems managing persistent data.

items.heading: Integration Layer
items.description: APIs and services enabling communication between systems.

items.heading: Infrastructure Layer
items.description: Cloud, servers, and networks supporting the entire stack.

takeaway: A modern enterprise application stack is layered to separate concerns, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and flexibility.
imagePrompt: A sleek futuristic cityscape at dawn with glowing interconnected digital layers symbolizing technology infrastructure and data flow
